Terms & Conditions

Please read carefully before booking

🪪
ID Requirements
  • Valid CNIC/ID card required for all adult guests
  • ID must be submitted at check-in
  • Children do not require ID — no issue
  • All staying guests must be registered
💳
Booking & Payment
  • Free cancellation before booking confirmation
  • Payment non-refundable after confirmation
  • Confirm booking via WhatsApp only
  • Guest liable for any damage to apartment
🚫
Strictly Prohibited
  • No drugs or narcotics
  • No alcohol or liquor
  • No weapons or firearms
  • No loud music at any time
✅
Guest Responsibility
  • Keep the apartment clean and tidy
  • Report any issues immediately
  • Broken or lost items — guest must pay
  • Respect other guests & neighbours
